🌿
India Business & Biodiversity Initiative (IBBI)
IBBI MEMBER
VVF India Limited has joined the India Business & Biodiversity Initiative (IBBI) — a CII-led platform encouraging Indian businesses to integrate biodiversity conservation into core operations. Our membership reinforces VVF's commitment to protecting and enhancing the biodiversity within and around our industrial premises, going beyond regulatory compliance towards proactive ecosystem stewardship.
🌐
United Nations Global Compact (UNGC)
UNGC SIGNATORY
VVF India Limited is a proud signatory to the United Nations Global Compact (UNGC) — the world's largest corporate sustainability initiative with 20,000+ participants across 160+ countries. We align our environmental strategy with the UNGC's Ten Principles on human rights, labour, environment, and anti-corruption, committing to a responsible and sustainable business model that respects planetary boundaries.
🌍
50%+
of global GDP depends on nature and ecosystem services provided by biodiversity
🐝
75%
of all flowering plant species rely on pollinators like bees and butterflies to reproduce
🌳
500+
species of insects, birds & fungi can be supported by a single mature tree
🦋
1 Million
plant and animal species currently face extinction — the fastest rate in human history
🌱
Green Belt Development — VVF India Taloja
VVF India Limited (Taloja) has proactively developed a Green Belt across our premises as part of our commitment to environmental stewardship. We have around 2,200+ trees and plants established across our facility boundary and internal green spaces. These plantings directly support the 44 species of flora and fauna documented on our site, creating corridors of native habitat within an industrial landscape. Scan the QR code below to explore the complete interactive species guide.
